protocol_note: Re-validation of the frozen tsmom_14_3 candidate on the DATA-005 quality-cleared PASS canonical dataset (native 1d promoted to daily). Same window, protocol, and risk policy as PAPER-008. No parameter changes. This is promotion-grade paper evidence, not LIVE.
canonical_dataset_quality_note: DATA-005 quality-cleared canonical bars via Approach A: BAR-001 extended to accept native 1d source bars as complete daily bars.
candidate_frozen_note: tsmom_14_3 lookback=14/skip=3 remains frozen as the selected research candidate. No further lookback/skip optimization or re-selection on this path is permitted without a new ticket and reviewer authorization.
live_eligible_note: PAPER-009 is promotion-grade paper evidence; no LIVE authorization.
oos_supports_live_path_note: Paper session gate satisfied, but LIVE promotion requires a separate ticket and owner policy.

comparison_to_paper_008.delta_note: Return is identical to PAPER-008 because the daily PASS partition and the intraday partition used under the REJECTED dataset contain the same native 1d source data. Economic signal and parameters are unchanged.

archive_note: ARCH-001: mod_tsmom_14_3_v1 has been rejected as a false discovery following EXP-008 multiple-testing analysis. This artifact is preserved for audit and reproducibility but is no longer valid evidence for LIVE promotion.
